response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Perform the read-only prerequisite stages first, but do not issue the mutating call until the explicit confirmation follow-up arrives.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Run the independent scoped searches in one assistant action.
Retrieve both resolved records together so the status condition can be checked.
Update only Jonah Reed after stage 2 verifies that its current status is screening.

state_assertions: Record rec-611 changes from screening to offer-review only after its retrieved status is verified.
Records rec-211 and rec-1011 remain unchanged.

follow_up_turns.content: I confirm: update only Jonah Reed from screening to offer-review.

prompt: Reconcile two records: search for Lena Ortiz in Customer Success and Jonah Reed in Design together, then retrieve the unique matches together. If Jonah Reed is still screening, change only that record to offer-review; otherwise make no change. Leave Lena Ortiz and every similarly named record untouched. Complete the searches and retrievals first, then wait for my explicit confirmation before updating. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.
